title: Add real-time notification on issue deletion
description:
Hook delete_issue() and delete_beads_issue() to publish NotificationEvent::IssueDeleted. Ensure frontend removes deleted issues immediately without waiting for snapshot refresh.

## Implementation Details

### Files to Modify
- rust/src/issue_delete.rs::delete_issue() (after fs::remove_file(), line 18)
- rust/src/beads_write.rs::delete_beads_issue() (after write_beads_records(), line 464)

### Pattern
```rust
// After successful deletion
publish_notification(NotificationEvent::IssueDeleted {
    issue_id: identifier.clone(),
})?;
```

### Testing
1. Create test issue: kbs create "Test delete" --type task
2. Note the issue ID
3. Delete it: kbs delete <issue-id>
4. Verify: Issue disappears from board within 100ms

### Error Handling
- Notification failure should not prevent deletion
- Log errors but continue operation
- Frontend polling fallback handles missed notifications

### Dependencies
Requires notification infrastructure from parent epic.
creator: ryan.porter
